persona.name: Aiden Thompson
persona.emotional_disposition: Calm and focused, occasionally overwhelmed by social situations
persona.motivations_goals: Develop innovative technology and study computer science at a top university
persona.communication_style: Technical, precise, sometimes assumes others follow his complex thinking
persona.backstory: Built his first computer at age 10, has already developed several successful apps

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

Large dining area for students and staff
Kitchen yard of the building, with an exit point.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Harper, have you checked out the new AI framework I mentioned last week?
actions.plan: I should probably grab some food before heading to the computer lab. I wonder if Harper has seen the new AI framework I've been working on.

actions.dialog_text: Harper, we need to get out of here. Follow me to the kitchen yard.
actions.plan: There's an active shooter nearby. I need to assess the situation quickly and find the safest exit. The kitchen yard seems like the shortest and most direct route to safety.
The shooter is in the cafeteria now. I need to act quickly and find a safe route. The kitchen yard is still the best option, but I need to move fast and stay out of sight.
I’m in the kitchen now, and the shooter is in the garden. The kitchen yard is just ahead, and it’s the quickest way to safety. I need to keep moving and avoid any distractions.

memories.description: I approached Harper in the cafeteria to ask if she had seen the new AI framework I've been developing.
I heard a gunshot and decided to lead Harper towards the kitchen yard, as it seems like the quickest and safest exit route.
The shooter entered the cafeteria, so I decided to sprint towards the kitchen yard to avoid detection and ensure my safety.
I reached the cafeteria kitchen and continued sprinting towards the kitchen yard, as it’s the closest exit and the shooter is in the garden.
